name: overseerr-mcp
description: Overseerr media requests via MCP tools with HTTP fallback. Search movies and TV shows, submit requests, and monitor failed requests.

overseerr_url.title: Overseerr URL
overseerr_url.description: Base URL of your Overseerr server, e.g. https://overseerr.example.com. No trailing slash.

plex_url.title: Plex URL
plex_url.description: Base URL of your Plex server, e.g. http://plex:32400. No trailing slash.

radarr_url.title: Radarr URL
radarr_url.description: Base URL of your Radarr server, e.g. http://radarr:7878. No trailing slash.

sonarr_url.title: Sonarr URL
sonarr_url.description: Base URL of your Sonarr server, e.g. http://sonarr:8989. No trailing slash.

prowlarr_url.title: Prowlarr URL
prowlarr_url.description: Base URL of your Prowlarr server, e.g. http://prowlarr:9696. No trailing slash.

tautulli_url.title: Tautulli URL
tautulli_url.description: Base URL of your Tautulli server, e.g. http://tautulli:8181. No trailing slash.

sabnzbd_url.title: SABnzbd URL
sabnzbd_url.description: Base URL of your SABnzbd server, e.g. http://sabnzbd:8080. No trailing slash.

qbittorrent_url.title: qBittorrent URL
qbittorrent_url.description: Base URL of your qBittorrent WebUI, e.g. http://qbittorrent:8080. No trailing slash.

appdata_path.title: Appdata Path
appdata_path.description: Path to your service appdata directory. Local: /mnt/cache/appdata — Remote (SSH): myserver:/mnt/cache/appdata. Host must be configured in ~/.ssh/config with key auth.
